articleContent:
For the couriers of Lollo Logistics, no hardship is too great, no obstacle too steep. Their resolve to deliver never wavers. As the collab season between Second Coming of Solaris and Lollo Logistics takes flight, their most demanding rush has begun...
Complete the assigned tasks and claim your delivery rewards!

✦Duration✦
2026-05-07 04:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

✦Rewards✦
Astrite x300, 2nd Anniversary Coin x300, Premium Resonance Potion x8, Premium Energy Core x8, Premium Sealed Tube x3, Premium Tuner x50, Shell Credit x450000, and other Materials.

✦Eligibility✦
Reach Union Level 14.

✦Event Rules✦
- During the event, complete event tasks to earn delivery rewards.
- Complete all pre-existing delivery tasks to unlock follow-up tasks and rewards.
- Packages are delivered in 3 separate batches.
- Any unclaimed rewards will be reissued via in-game Mail upon your next login within 30 days after the event ends.
